# BI-260006: Operationalize section-8 release verification gates

- Backlog Item ID: BI-260006
- Title: Implement and run mandatory release gate checks for public-site deployments
- Status: Done
- Persona/Actor: CI/CD system
- Value statement: For the project, implement automated checks to verify that every deployment meets
  quality standards before it goes live.
- Context: Section 8 decisions are accepted and must be applied consistently at release time.
- Problem statement: Without a fixed gate model, releases may pass CI but still ship broken links,
  wrong sign-in targets, or device regressions.
- Expected outcome: Each release has reproducible pass/fail evidence across local and deployed
  environments.
- Success metric(s): No accepted release bypasses mandatory checks; regressions trigger prompt
  rollback handling.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - Mandatory route/link/sign-in/static/mobile checks are executed per release.
  - Results are captured in a release verification note.
  - Repository owner sign-off is recorded only after all mandatory checks pass.
  - Failed checks block acceptance and trigger rollback procedure if already deployed.
- Non-goals: Full end-to-end browser automation as an immediate hard requirement.
- Constraints: Lightweight operational overhead suitable for current project stage.
- Dependencies: Stable route list and link targets from sections 5-7 decisions.
- Risks/assumptions: Manual checks may miss edge cases until deeper automation is introduced.
- Validation approach: Release checklist execution plus retained verification notes.
- Priority score: High
- Target window: Before first production launch
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-FR-260006.md
  - ADR: ADR-260006.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - PR/changeset: n/a
